attributes.title: [Couchbase] SRE Sync Gateway operations
attributes.description: Sync Gateway process health, DCP lag gauge, document throughput, channel cache, and security counters.

params.markdown:
## [Couchbase] SRE Sync Gateway operations

Mobile/edge data plane signals:
- Process CPU and Go heap footprint
- DCP processing time (change feed pressure)
- Document read/write rates from REST/BLIP
- Channel cache effectiveness
- Security and shared-bucket import failures

query.esql:
FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS cpu = AVG(couchbase.resource.process.cpu.pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS cpu = AVG(couchbase.resource.process.cpu.pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS rss = AVG(couchbase.resource.process.memory.resident)

FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS rss = AVG(couchbase.resource.process.memory.resident)

TS metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS err_delta = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.resource.error.count))

TS metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS err_delta = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.resource.error.count))

TS metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS warn_delta = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.resource.warn.count))

TS metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS warn_delta = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.resource.warn.count))

FROM metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS dcp = AVG(couchbase.database_stats.dcp.received.time)

FROM metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS dcp = AVG(couchbase.database_stats.dcp.received.time)

TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS failed_auth = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.authentications.failed.count))

TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS failed_auth = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.authentications.failed.count))

attributes.title: Sync Gateway process CPU and heap

query.esql:
FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS cpu = AVG(couchbase.resource.process.cpu.pct), heap = AVG(couchbase.resource.go_memstats.heap.in_use) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS cpu = AVG(couchbase.resource.process.cpu.pct), heap = AVG(couchbase.resource.go_memstats.heap.in_use) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS in_b = AVG(couchbase.resource.admin_net.bytes.received), out_b = AVG(couchbase.resource.admin_net.bytes.sent) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.resource"
| STATS in_b = AVG(couchbase.resource.admin_net.bytes.received), out_b = AVG(couchbase.resource.admin_net.bytes.sent) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS dcp_t = AVG(couchbase.database_stats.dcp.received.time) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS dcp_t = AVG(couchbase.database_stats.dcp.received.time) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS wr = SUM(RATE(couchbase.database_stats.document.writes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS wr = SUM(RATE(couchbase.database_stats.document.writes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS rr = SUM(RATE(couchbase.database_stats.document.reads.rest)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS rr = SUM(RATE(couchbase.database_stats.document.reads.rest)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS br = SUM(RATE(couchbase.database_stats.document.reads.blip)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.database_stats-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.database_stats"
| STATS br = SUM(RATE(couchbase.database_stats.document.reads.blip)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.database_stats.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cache-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cache"
| EVAL hit_ratio = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cache.channel.hits) / (TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cache.channel.hits) + TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cache.channel.misses) + 1.0)
| STATS hr = AVG(hit_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cache.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cache-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cache"
| EVAL hit_ratio = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cache.channel.hits) / (TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cache.channel.hits) + TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cache.channel.misses) + 1.0)
| STATS hr = AVG(hit_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.cache.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS auth_fail = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.authentications.failed.count)), access_err = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.access.errors.count)), doc_rej = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.documents.rejected.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS auth_fail = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.authentications.failed.count)), access_err = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.access.errors.count)), doc_rej = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.documents.rejected.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Shared bucket import errors over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS imp_err = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.shared_bucket.import.documents.errors.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.miscellaneous.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS imp_err = SUM(INCREASE(couchbase.miscellaneous.shared_bucket.import.documents.errors.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.miscellaneous.database.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Sync Gateway security — latest snapshot by database

query.esql:
TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS access_err = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.access.errors.count)), doc_rej = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.documents.rejected.count)), delta_sent = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.delta_sync.sent)), gsi_ch = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.gsi_views.channels.count)) BY db = couchbase.miscellaneous.database.name
| SORT access_err DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-couchbase.miscellaneous-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.miscellaneous"
| STATS access_err = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.access.errors.count)), doc_rej = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.security.documents.rejected.count)), delta_sent = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.delta_sync.sent)), gsi_ch = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.miscellaneous.gsi_views.channels.count)) BY db = couchbase.miscellaneous.database.name
| SORT access_err DESC
| LIMIT 50
